usage: create_metric_table [-help] [-auto_hide] [-collapsible_key] [-format {html excel text}] -heading <string> [-hide_footers] [-hide_graph_footers] [-hierarchy_separator <string>] [-id <string>] [-key <string>] [-per_snapshot] [-show_label_every <integer>] -type {horizontal vertical cpu dict histogram imageplot}

options.name: -auto_hide
options.description: whether to auto hide the table

options.name: -collapsible_key
options.description: collapse key columns with option to expand them

options.name: -hide_footers
options.description: hide the min, average and max rows from the bottom of the table. Graph buttons are still shown

options.name: -hide_graph_footers
options.description: hide the graph buttons from the bottom of the table

options.name: -hierarchy_separator
options.description: show the metric names with hierarchy using the provided separator

options.name: -show_label_every
options.description: frequency of X axis labels in the histogram

options.name: -type
options.description: {horizontal vertical cpu dict histogram imageplot} type (horizontal|vertical|cpu|dict|histogram|imageplot) of table
